titleStmt.title: Egypt, Dayr as-Suryān, DS Ethiop. 2
Gospel of John, Miracles of Mary
إنجيل يوحنا، معجزات مريم

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

list.item: Fols ir–84v Foliation in pencil in Eastern Arabic numerals in the lower right corner, from ١ on ir until ٨٦ on 84r.
Fols ir–84v Foliation in pencil in the centre of the bottom of the recto. This is the foliation used as reference in this record.

binding.decoNote: Ethiopian. Two wooden boards covered with light brown blind-tooled leather. Blind-tooled mitred turn-ins, textile inlays (floral motif). Leather patches covering the lacing holes. Two pairs of sewing stations. The endbands intact.

history.origin:
النصف الثاني من القرن التاسع عشر / أوائل القرن العشرين
Second half of the nineteenth/early twentieth century.
The main Text I (Gospel of John) of Unit 1 was written by Gabra ʾIyasus mentioned in the incipit, possibly before 1912/1913 (cp. Additional note 2 of Unit 1). The name of the original commissioner on fol. 1rb seems to have been erased, the name of Takla Hāymānot inserted over the erasure. Unit 2 was added not much later.
history.provenance:
The manuscript was donated by Takla Hāymānot to Dabra Māryām in Eritrea (cp. Additional note 2 of Unit 2), later it was in the possession of Gabra ʾIyasus Walda Mikāʾel from the same monastery (cp. Additional note 7 of Unit 1).
A recent Arabic note (cp. Additional note 3 of Unit 1) indicates that the book belonged to ʿAbd al-Masīḥ al-Ḥabašī.

msItem.title: Gospel of John
msItem.incipit: ብስራተ፡ አብ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ትሩፍ፡ ረድእ፡ ተናጋሪ፡ በመለኮት፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወልደ፡ ዘብዴዎስ፡ ፍቁረ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክስስቶስ፡
Fol. 1rb ጸሎቱ፡ ወበረከቱ፡ የሃሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ገብሩ፡ ተክለ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ወጸሐፊሁ፡ ኃጥእ፡ ገብረ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን።

Fols 1ra–1va ቀዳሚሁ፡ ቃል፡ ውእቱ፡ ወውእቱ፡ ቃል፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ውእቱ፡ ወእግዚአብሔር፡ ውእቱ፡ ቃል፡ ወከማሁ፡ ቀዳሚሁ፡ እምቀዲሙ፡ ኀበ፡ ውእቱ፡ ወኵሉ፡ ቦቱ፡ ኮነ፡ ወዘእንበሌሁሰ፡ አልቦ፡ ዘኮነ፡ ወዘሂ፡ ኮነ፡ በእንቲአሁ፡ ቦቱ፡ ሕይወት፡ ውእቱ፡ ወሕይወትሰ፡ ብርሃኑ፡ ለእጓለ፡ እመሕያው፡ ውእቱ፡ ወብር
ሃንሰ፡ ዘውስተ፡ ጽልመት፡ ያበርህ፡ ወያርኢ፡ ወጽልመትኒ፡ ኢይረክቦ፡ ወኢይቀርቦ፨ ፨ ፨
msItem.explicit: Fols 74va–74vb ወዘንተ፡ ገብረ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ወቦ፡ ባዕድኒ፡ ብዙኅ፡ ዘገብረ፡ ወሶበ፡ ተጽሕፈ፡ ኵሉ፡ በበ፩እምኢያግመሮ፡ ዓለም፡ ጥቀ፡ ወመጻሕፍቲሁ፡ ዘተጽሕፈ፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን፨

Fols 74vb–75ra መልዓ፡ ጽሕፈተ፡ ብስራቱ፡ ለዮሐንስ፡ ወልደ፡ ዘብዴዎስ፡ ሐዋርያ፡ ፩እም፲ወ፪ እንተ፡ ጸሐፎ፡ በዮናኒ፡ ለሰብአ፡ ሀገረ፡ ኤፌሶን፡ እምድኅረ፡ ዕርገቱ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በሥጋ፡ ውስተ፡ ሰማይ፡ በ፵ዓመት፡ ወ፰ዓመተ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ለኔሮን፡ ንጉሥ፡ ወልደ፡ አቅሎንድዮስ፡ ወስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨

msItem.title: On the length of the day during the months of the year

layout.note: Number of characters per line: fols. 13ra, : 9-11; 23ra: 9-12.
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 11r.

handNote.seg: Second half of the nineteenth-/early twentieth-century script.
Incipits, chapter titles, names Jesus and Christ, parts of the punctuation sign ፨, days of the week written in the upper margin.
handNote.date: Second half of the 19th/ early 20th century.
handNote.desc: Careful, regular; by a well-trained scribe (name: Gabra ʾIyasus).

handNote.seg: Second half of the nineteenth-/early twentieth-century script.
handNote.desc:
Careful but somewhat irregular; by a poorly trained scribe. Very similar or possibly identical to the hand of
Additional note 4 in Unit 1 and Hand 3 in Unit 2.

item.desc: Note on the chronology of life of ʾAbsādi of Dabra Māryām, indicating that 654 years passed from his birth in 1200 EC (=1207/1208 CE) to the year 41 ‘of Mercy’. The latter date could be interpreted as 1941 EC (=1948/1949 CE) but the difference (741 years) does not match the span of 654 years.
item.q: በ፲፻ወ፪፻ አመተ፡ ምህረት፡ ተወልደ፡ አቡነ፡ አብሳዲ፡ እምዘ፡ ተወልደ፡ እስከ፡ ፵፩ አ፡ ም፡ ት፡ ፮፻፶፬ አመት፡ ገብረ።

item.desc: Note on chronology mentioning the mythical king Tewodros coming in the year 7405, and the end of the world taking place in the year 7448 of the Era of the World (completion of the 14th 532-year cycle), i.e. 1912/1913 CE and 1955/1956 CE, respectively.
item.q: ንዌጥን፡ ሐሳበ፡ ትስብዕት፡ በ፭ሽተ፭፻ዓመት፡ ተሰብዓ፡ እግዚእነ፡ በዘመነ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወንጌላዊ፡ በ፭ሽ፡ ተ፭፻፩ዓመት፡ ተወልደ፡ እግዚእነ፡ በዘመነ፡ ማቴዎስ፡ ወንጌላዊ፡ በ፭ሽ፡ ተ፭፻፴፩ዓመት፡ ተጠምቀ፡ እግዚእነ፡ በዘመነ፡ ሉቃስ፡ ወንጌላዊ፡ በ፭ሽ፡ ተ፭፻፴፬ ዓመት፡ ተሰቅለ፡ እግዚእነ፡ በዘመነ፡ ማርቆስ፡ መንጌላዊ፡ በ ፯ሽ፡ ተ፬፻፭ ዓመት፡ ይመጽእ፡ ቴዎድሮስ፡ በዘመነ፡ ማቴዎስ፡ ወንጌላዊ፡ ወይነግሥ፡ ፵መተ፡ በ፯ሽ፡ ተ፬፻፵፭ ዓመት፡ ይመጽእ፡ ሐሳዌ፡ መሢሕ፡ ወይነግሥ፡ ፫ዓመተ፡ ወያሠርቅ፡ ፀሀየ፡ በምዕራብ፡ ወወርሀ፡ በምሥራቅ፡ ወይእኅዝ፡ ፀሀየ፡ በዕዴሁ፡ በ፯ሽ፡ ተ፬፻፵፰ዓመት፡ የኃልፍ፡ ዓለም።

item.desc: Arabic ownership note stating that this book belongs to ʿAbd al-Masīḥ al-Ḥabašī.
item.q:
هذا الكتاب ملك
القس عبد المسيح الحبشي

item.desc:
Ownership note in red mentioning
ʾAbbā Takla Hāymānot of Dabra Māryām of ʾAbsādi.

q.hi: ዝመጽሐፍ፡ ዘአባ፡ ተክለ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ሀገሩ፡ ደብረ፡ ማርያም፡ ዘአባ፡ አብሳዲ፡

item.desc: Beginning of a condemnation note.

q.seg: ወካእበ፡ ናስተበቈኦ፡ ለአምላከ፡ ምሕረት፡ ዘረዳእከ፡ ለአብርሃም፡ አመ፡ ይቀት፡ ሎሙ፡ ለነገስት፡ ዘአድሐንኮ፡ ለይስሐቅ፡ እምነ፡ መጥባሕት፡ ዘመራሕኮ፡ ለያዕቆብ፡ በውስተ፡ መንገድ፡
ፈኑ፡ እማዴ፡ ሰማይ፡ ወምድር፡ ባርክ፡ ማህበረነ፡ በኵሉ፡ ጊዜ፡ ወበኩሉ፡ ሰአት፡ በአሐዱ፡ ወልድከ፡ ዘቦቱ፡ ለከ፡ ምስሌሁ፡

item.desc: Recent ownership note stating that the manuscript belongs to Gabra ʾIyasus Walda Mikāʾel of Dabra Māryām.

q.hi:
ዝመጽሐፍ፡
አባ፡ ገብረ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ወልደ፡ ሚካኤ፡ ደብረ፡ ማርያም፡

item.desc: Arabic title written in pencil.
Arabic shelfmarks.
Note in pencil on the top of the page, poorly readable.
item.q: የቀድመ፡ ፬፻ አመ፡ የኋላ፡ ዘመ ፬፻፵፩ አመተ፡ ምት

item.desc: Crude note in pencil on the bottom of the page, poorly readable.
Arabic title in red ink.

q.hi: انجيل يوحنا وميمر عجائب السيدة العذراء

item.desc: Stamps of Dayr as-Suryān.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in the upper margin, rubricated and encircled with an expunctuated line.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in pencil in the right margin.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in pencil in the right margin.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in pencil in the upper margin.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in the upper margin, rubricated and encircled with an expunctuated line.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in the upper margin, rubricated and encircled with an expunctuated line.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in the upper margin, rubricated and encircled with an expunctuated line.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in pencil in the upper margin.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in the upper margin, rubricated and encircled with an expunctuated line.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in pencil in the upper margin.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in the upper margin, rubricated and encircled with an expunctuated line.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in the upper margin, rubricated and encircled with an expunctuated line.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in the upper margin, rubricated and encircled with an expunctuated line.
Reading is indicated by the name of the day of the week written in pencil in the upper margin.
Indication for reading in pencil in the upper margin.

binding.decoNote: Leaf string markers (differently coloured threads) inserted through holes in the upper outer corners of fols. 5, 6, 9, 18, 32, 39, 44, 47, 69, 72.

origin.origDate: النصف الثاني من القرن التاسع عشر / أوائل القرن العشرين

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa śǝrʿāt za-waṣʾa ʾǝm-manbara Mārqos ḥawāryā ʾǝm-makāna maʿāllǝqā
msItem.incipit: Fols 77ra–77rb በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ፩አምላክ፡ ዝቱ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ሥርዓት፡ ዘወፅአ፡ እመንበረ፡ ማርቆስ፡ ሐዋርያ፡ እመከነ፡ መዓልቃ፡ ዘምስር፡ ዘአንበሩ፡ መምህራን፡ ክቡራን፡ መጋብያነ፡ ሕግ፡ ዘምሥጢር፡ ርቱዓነ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ዘትትናገሮሙ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ቅድስት፡ ድንግ ል፡ ማርያም፡ ዘልፈ፡ ቦአመ፡ ትትናገሮሙ፡ በሕልም፡ ወቦ፡ አመ፡ ትትናገሮሙ፡ በራእይ። ወቦ፡ አመትትናገሮሙ፡ ገሐደ።

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: The Story of the Cannibal of Qǝmr
msItem.incipit: Fols 80vb–81ra ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ቅድስት፡ ድንግል፡ በክልኤ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ጸሎታ፡ ወበረከታ፡ የሃሉ፡ ገብራ፡ ወልደ፡ ተክለ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ወልደ፡ ተክለ ሃይማኖት፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን። ወሀሎ፡ ፩ ብእሲ፡ በሀገረ፡ ቅምር፡ ክቡረ፡ ዘመድ፡ ዘበስም፡ ክርስቲያናዊ፡ ወኃጢአቱ፡ ዐቢይ፡ ወፍዱል፡ እምኃጣውአ፡ ኵሉ፡ ሰብእ፡ ወባዕል፡ ጥቀ፡ ፈድፋደ፡ ወኢይበልዕ፡ ወኢ፡ ሥጋ፡ ላህም፡ ወኢ፡ እንስሳ፡ አላ፡ ይበልዕ፡ ሥጋ፡ ሰብእ፡
msItem.explicit: Fol. 84ra በጸሎታ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ኦአኃዊነ፡ ስምዑ፡ ዘከመዝ፡ ድኅነ፡ በላዔ፡ ሰብእ፡ በምልአ፡ ሕፍነ፡ ማይ፡ ወእፎኑመ፡ ዘይገብር፡ ተዝካራ፡ ወዘየሐንጽ፡ መርጡላ፡ ወይትሐነ አመን፡ በጸሎታ፡ ወይረክብ፡ ሞገሰ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ሕሳዌ፡
Fols 84ra–84rb ጸሎታ፡ ወበረከታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ገብራ፡ ተክለሃይማኖትለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ፍቀርኪ፨ ፨ ፨
Fol. 84rb አድኃኖ፡ ለበላዔሰብእ፡ ጊጉይ፡ እንበይነ፡ ሕፍነ፡ ማይ፡ ዘቆመ፡ በገፀ፡ ነዳይ፡ ከንቱ፡ ከንቱ፡ በታኅተ፡ ሰማይ፡ ምንትኑ፡ ለእጓለ፡ እመሕያው፡ ሠናይ፡ እንበለ፡ ፍቅርኪ፡ ማርያም፡ ባሕርይ፨

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 78r.

handNote.seg: Second half of the nineteenth-/early twentieth-century script.
Incipits, the name of ማርያም፡, the name of the owner ተክለ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ in Additional note 3 of Unit 2, parts of numerals and punctuation marks.
handNote.date: Second half of the 19th century to early 20th century.
handNote.desc: Careful but irregular; by a poorly trained scribe.

item.desc: Note on the dates of Marian feasts.
item.q: ወቦእለ፡ ይብሉ፡ አመ፡ ፲ለመስከረም፡ ልደታ፡ ንሕነሰ፡ ንብል፡ ጥዩቀ፡ በከመ፡ መሀሩነ፡ አበዊነ፡ ሊቃውንት፡ አመ፡ ፩ለግንቦት፡ ልደታ፡ ወአመ፡ ፳ሁ፡ ይትጋብዑ፡ ኵሉ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ እምስራቅ፡ ወእምእራብ፡ እምሰሜን፡ ወእምዕራብ፡ ምደቡብ፡ ወይትዓየኑ፡ በደብተር፡ ወበሐይመታት፡ ወበሰቀልው፡ ወበአገቦር፡ ወይእኅዙ፡ ገቢረ፡ በዓላ፡ ለድንግል፡ አመ፡ ፳ወ፩ሂ፡ አመ፡ ፳ወ፪ሂ፡ አመ፡ ፳ወ፫ሂ፡

item.desc:
Donation note stating that this manuscript belongs to
Takla Hāymānot, who donated it to Dabra Māryām. The end of the note is accomodated in . In the same hand as Additional note 2 of Unit 2.
item.q:
ዛቲ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ዘአቡነ ፡ ተክለ፡ ሃማኖት፡ ዘወሐቦ፡ ለአቡነ፡ አብሳዲ፡ ዘደብረ፡ ማርያም፡ ከመ፡ ይኵን፡ መርሃ፡ ለመንግስተ፡ ሰማያት፡
እትርስኡኒ፡ ፩አቡነ፡ ዘበሰማያት፡ ሃበ፡ ፀሎትክም። ዘሰረቆ፡ ወዘፈፈሃቆ፡ ውጉዘ፡ ለይኩን፡

item.desc: Written in the upper margin in faded black ink.

origin.origDate: النصف الثاني من القرن التاسع عشر / أوائل القرن العشرين

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: Updated description during the consultation of the manuscript
